message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series.head + Series.tail (6 cases)

Append 6 live-pandas oracle tests covering Series.head and Series.tail
windowing methods:

- head_default (n=5), head_n_3 (string index), head_larger_than_len
- tail_default (n=5), tail_n_2 (string index), tail_negative_n

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle, parses the expected
Series, runs the Rust implementation, and asserts parity via
compare_series_expected. Negative-n tail tests pandas' "drop first |n|"
semantics. SeriesHead and SeriesTail were already wired in
FixtureOperation; this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-juuri]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
